DP.152.0000:
Yo!
Fellow Trainer!\f
Your Pokémon are secure inside their
Poké Balls, but there’s no masking\r
that aura of serious toughness!\f
Oops, sorry, I should introduce
myself.\f
The name’s Flint! I’m one of
the Pokémon League’s Elite Four!\f
DP.152.0001:
I just had this idea.
Maybe you can pull it off.\f
It’s about this town’s Gym Leader.\f
He’s really lost his enthusiasm lately
because there’ve been so few good\r
challengers worth his time.\f
He’s been so bored, he spends all his
time renovating the Gym.\f
And then the blackout happened...
That sure didn’t help lift his mood.\f
You know where I’m going with this,
don’t you?\f
I need you to give him a battle
that’s so hot, it will reignite his\r
passion for battling.\f
I’m counting on you, hotshot!\f
DP.152.0002:
Flint: Yo! Hiya!
He hasn’t come back yet.\f
When he does, you know what you’ve
gotta do.\f
Give him a battle that’s so hot, it
will reignite his passion for battling!\f
I’m counting on you, hotshot!
DP.152.0003:
Flint: Yo! Hiya!
He’s finally come back!\f
He seemed to be feeling upbeat, too.\f
I have a hunch that he recognized
your toughness right away.\f
I bet he’s getting excited over
the thought of battling you.\f
Remember what you have to do,
hotshot.\f
Give him a battle that’s so hot, it
will reignite his passion for battling!\f
All right, hotshot! I’ll be waiting at
the Pokémon League!\f
DP.152.0004:
...Er...um... M-my name is Jasmine,
and I’m a Gym Leader.\f
Oh, I’m sorry, not the Gym Leader
of this town...\f
I’m a Gym Leader in the Johto
region...\f
...Er...um...
It would be nice if you knew about\r
the Johto region...\f
DP.152.0005:
Oh, if you don’t have the Gym Badge,
you’ll be forced to turn back.
DP.152.0006:
Oh, that’s this town’s Gym Badge.
You must be very good.\f
...Er...um...
P-please take this, too.\f
DP.152.0007:
...That Hidden Machine...
It contains Waterfall.\f
If you use it, you can get to
the Pokémon League.\f
...Um... I... I don’t know how
I should say this, but good luck.
DP.152.0008:
Jasmine: ...This city makes me feel
at home somehow.\f
It’s next to the sea, and there’s
a lighthouse...\f
DP.152.0009:
Jasmine: ...I came from very far away
because I wanted to get stronger.\f
On the way, I met all sorts of 
people with their Pokémon...\f
They all looked like they were having
fun. I felt happy seeing it.
DP.152.0011:
That giant rock...
Isn’t it really a Pokémon?
DP.152.0013:
The Gym Leader uses too much
electricity!\f
He needs to think about the city’s
power needs, too!
DP.152.0014:
The city uses a lot of electricity,
especially the lighthouse and\r
the Gym.\f
They finally decided to turn all
the roads inside the city into giant\r
solar panels.\f
Sunyshore is the Sunshine City, so
the system works perfectly.
DP.152.0015:
This is a major port town.
And...\f
It’s the gateway to the Pokémon
League.
DP.152.0016:
Whatever the environment, people
and Pokémon adapt to live there.\f
That’s what we all do to survive.
DP.152.0018:
Sunyshore City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Volkner\r
The Shining, Shocking Star
DP.152.0019:
Vista Lighthouse
The Beacon That Lights Sinnoh
DP.152.0020:
Sunyshore Market
A Selection of the World’s Seals
DP.152.0021:
Julia’s House
Delightful Ribbons for Pokémon
DP.152.0022: It’s a blank sign painted white.
